item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Easy to Use, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Waterproof

about_item: Orthopedic Memory Foam: Our xxl dog bed uses a combination of 40D memory foam and 30D high-density foam. Evenly distributes weight and conforms to your pet's body, reducing pet stress and protecting joints.

Wraparound zipper design: Use the 360-degree zipper to easily separate the top and bottom covers, allowing you to washable only the parts you need, ensuring your orthopedic dog bed stays in like-new condition.
Double 100% Waterproof: The removable washable cover and foam are protected with a 100% waterproof liner. Educes Liquid Penetration and Enhances waterproof dog bed durability.

SIZE GUIDE: The dog crate bed measures 48 inches (L) x 30 inches (W) x 6 inches (H). With a thickness of 6 inches, you no longer have to worry about your dog touching the ground. This bed is ideally designed for extra large adult dogs.
Various Scenes: This versatile dog mat is adaptable for placement in both the living room and car, and it's also compatible with most dog crates and kennels.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be an excellent orthopedic mattress that provides extra room for large dogs and excellent support, with one customer noting it helps with hip dysplasia. The bed features a plush cover and is durable, with one customer mentioning it keeps its shape well. While customers consider it worth the price, the zipper quality receives mixed reviews, with some finding it well-made while others report broken zippers.

authors_reviews.title: Great for a Great Dane needing thick support
authors_reviews.text: For 2 130lb Great Danes these work well. They are not squishy where the dog lays down and the middle caves in. There is a thick layer of egg crating then a top layer of memory type foam. For $122. I think they were worth the money. I bought two XXL ones the 54" ones and dogs have plenty of room. Their bodies look nice and supported not dented in. I like these for the price. Thought of buying the K9 ballistics but mine are not bed chewers. It was easy to assemble and the foam became firm right away. Recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Happy fur baby!
authors_reviews.text: I personally cant say its comfortable but my fur baby absolutely loves her new bed. The cover is very heavy and plush plus it has a waterproof cover as well under the main one. Both are easy to remove to wash. Shes a nester when she gets ready for bed so she digs and spins but she hasnt hurt it yet. I feel its definitely worth the money spent. She's a big girl and has plenty of room. It is a quailty bed worth the money.
authors_reviews.author: tilley anello

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic Orthopedic Dog Bed!
authors_reviews.text: This is a very good quality bed! I purchased it for my almost 15-year-old GSD mix. We have owned a Barker Bed for several years, but I was looking to get a second bed without paying an astronomical price. Am very pleased with the quality of this bed. Even though the thickness is not quite as much as the Barker Bed, It's still fully supports my 90 lb baby! And I've sat and laid on it myself and it is very comfortable! I appreciate that its height isn't quite as tall as his other orthopedic bed because at his age, it's getting harder for him to step up too high, So this one is even easier for him to get on to because I believe this one is 4 in tall and his other one is in tall. I also think the cover for this one is way easier to put on and take off and I love the fact that it has a handle to make it easier to move this bed around! Again, because this one is not quite as tall as his other orthopedic bed, it's not as heavy either. So far, I have washed and dried it twice and it is still holding up very well! Wish I had bought this years ago because it would have been way easier to travel with (And it certainly costs a lot less than his other one!)! Definitely worth the purchase and would not hesitate buying again!
authors_reviews.author: Deana

authors_reviews.title: Best giant breed dog bed I've ever purchased
authors_reviews.text: I have (3) Great Dane rescues - these beds are BY FAR the best quality for your money, and I've bought a lot of beds for a lot more money. Very thick, dense foam & you can remove just the zippered top for laundering. Have had for a few months & all still look new.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Best dog bed and easy to wash.
authors_reviews.text: I ordered an extra dark gray cover, size xxl, because my dog ripped the top layer of the original cover digging before laying down. The rip did not through the other layers and even though the cover smelled doggy the inside cover did not smell at all or have any dirt on it. I washed both covers yesterday for the first time and was surprised how easy it was and they look like new. Regular wash and dried in the dryer. Love this bed and the covers.
authors_reviews.author: Karen V

authors_reviews.title: Dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Very nice dog bed. My 150# 9 yo great dane seems comfortable on it. It's soft but doesn't collapse. I love the zip-off waterproof cover to help keep the dog odor down in the house.ETA: removing a star because my dog managed to rip open the zipper within one month by pawing at it, so now the zipper is off of its track and it kind of defeats the purpose of purchasing a dog bed with a zip off waterproof cover.
authors_reviews.author: C. Emry

authors_reviews.title: Im very please with this thick foam dog bed.
authors_reviews.text: Good price, nice dog bed that is thick enough there is support for my dogs body, keeping him off the cement floors. Cover is nicely made and I already washed and dried it on a gentle cycle because it was dirty. Washed up nice and went back on easily. Zipper seemed well made and sturdy. A dog bed is a big investment in your dogs comfort. I'm very please with this dog bed for my handicap dog.
authors_reviews.author: Carol Meiring

authors_reviews.title: Not memory foam
authors_reviews.text: Not a bad bed. Definitely not memory foam. The waterproof cover wasn’t stitched properly but I made it work. The outer cover is very nice. It fits our large dog crate well. My 90 lb pup seems to be very comfortable laying on it. The dog bed is very decent but overpriced. Real memory foam would’ve earned 5 stars and justified the cost
authors_reviews.author: K. Osia

other_countries_reviews.title: Expensive
other_countries_reviews.text: It is a bit expensive to the quality it offers.
other_countries_reviews.author: suresh
